isi.lyrics:
Lyric Forestella - Everything

Romanization

I’m swimming through the ocean of you
Strolling through the forest of you
You remind me of so many things at once

It’s everything from your words to your scent
They slip and flow endlessly through my universe

Whenever you laugh
I can’t help but notice
That my laugh seeped in yours
And kept me up at night
Was I busy being in your dreams too

The love has been kept alive through the centuries
Never knew I'd
be in love with somebody like you

Across light years worth of love
You are there above
Floating down the colorful Northern Lights
Your eyes locked in mine

We have found (the) land of the unknown
Affectionately ours
The mystery unfolds
We belong to us

The love has been kept alive through the centuries
Never knew I'd
be in love with somebody like you

You are there above

Your eyes locked in mine

You remind me of so much
